name: Honeycrisp Apple Tree
description_sale: Cold-hardy semi-dwarf apple tree, prized for sweet-tart fruit and exceptional storage life. Ripens late September. Pollinator required.

name: Boxwood 'Green Velvet'
description_sale: Compact evergreen shrub with dense rich-green foliage. Excellent for low hedges and formal plantings. Holds color through winter.

name: Concord Grape Vine
description_sale: Classic American slip-skin grape — the jam, juice, and jelly grape. Vigorous, cold-hardy, self-fertile. Trellis required.
